name: Console Login Without MFA
description: Simulates an attacker logging into the AWS console using IAM user credentials without MFA, generating a CloudTrail ConsoleLogin event with MFAUsed=No — a high-signal indicator for accounts that should enforce MFA.
prerequisites: IAM user with a console login profile and no MFA device configured (stratus-red-team-no-mfa-user)
detection_signal: CloudTrail ConsoleLogin event with additionalEventData.MFAUsed=No for users that should have MFA enforced
